items.title: Google's new Windows app is yet another way to access Gemini
items.summary: Google has introduced a new app for Windows desktops and, unsurprisingly, it puts AI front at center. If you aren't a big fan of Google's Gemini chatbot, then skip on past this...

items.title: AI data center startup Fluidstack in talks for $1B round at $18B valuation months after hitting $7.5B, says report
items.summary: Fundraising is reportedly flowing for Fluidstack after it secured a $50 billion deal to build data centers for Anthropic.
